title: 网络小说作者受困于AI风格，平台亦然
description: 2026年上半年，番茄小说多次向作者发布公告，加大内容审核力度，减少平台上低质量的AI作品。
titleZh: 网络小说作者受困于AI风格，平台亦然
titleEn: Web novel authors trapped in the AI flavor, and so are the platforms
descriptionZh: 2026年上半年，番茄小说多次向作者发布公告，加大内容审核力度，减少平台上低质量的AI作品。
descriptionEn: In the first half of 2026, Tomato Novel repeatedly issued announcements to authors, stepping up content review efforts to reduce low-quality AI works on the platform. In June alone, Tomato Novel refused to sign over 100,000 low-quality books and disposed of more than 40,000 low-quality, rule-violating books.
